title: Plee'h
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Plee'h''' was a group of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]]. During the supply shortage following the sortie from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], they were about to receive grain from seemingly defected [[Ghorin]], near the edge of his territory.

However the Imperials had already mined the area around the [[Hyperspace navigation buoy|Hyperspace Navigation Buoy]] of their arrival. When that was learned, it was too late since the freighters were already in hyperspace.

[[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] on an [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] of [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] single-handedly cleaned up the mine field in time before the freighters approach.

==Behind the scenes==
*Plee'h is maybe an anagram of ''heelp'', referring to the difficult situation the freighters were found

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
